_patch_meta.description: Session B completion patch for registry 126 (purpose). Sets session_b_status to Session B Complete, correcting the recurring applicator anomaly (fourth consecutive registry: 98, 34, 160, 126). Session B analysis document: WA-126-purpose-analysis-20260326.docx (479 paragraphs, 6 parts). 48 working terms analysed. 3 research flags active: PH2-126-000 HIGH extraction anomaly, PH2-126-001 and PH2-126-002 volume limitation. Key finding: purpose is primarily a divine attribute; human purposing operates within, against, or in alignment with prior divine purpose.

operations.description: RECURRING APPLICATOR ANOMALY — fourth consecutive registry (98, 34, 160, 126). update_registry ops in PREANALYSIS patches continue to not execute. session_b_status remains Pre-Analysis Complete; patch_id and applied_at null. OP-001 corrects registry 126 directly to Session B Complete. Claude Code must resolve this before the next registry. Pattern confirmed: update_mti_status ops succeed; update_registry ops fail silently.

Session B analysis complete for registry 126 (purpose). Document: WA-126-purpose-analysis-20260326.docx. Working set: 48 terms (32 extracted, 16 extracted_thin | Hebrew 27, Greek 21). Pre-analysis: single patch PREANALYSIS-V1 (216 ops). Most extensive bleed of any registry to date: davar family (10 sub-glosses), natan family (12 sub-glosses), avar family (6 sub-glosses) all removed. Also corrected H3820A lev (heart) cross-registry contamination. HIGH priority: PH2-126-000 extraction anomaly = fourth consecutive instance. Programme-wide audit urgently required (PH2-34-005).
